title: Finding Seasonal Patterns in Weekly Exports
summary: Seasonality hides in weekly CSV pulls until you chart enough history with consistent filters.

content.summary: Seasonality hides in weekly CSV pulls until you chart enough history with consistent filters.

body.text: One bad week is not a crisis; four aligned weeks might be seasonality. Upload twelve or more weeks with same saved rule. Line chart weekly totals and compare year-ago if available. Note holidays, fiscal calendars, and promo windows that explain spikes.

body.alt: Abstract visualization representing AI and data
body.caption: Abstract visualization representing AI and data. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload twelve or more weeks with same saved rule. Line chart weekly totals and compare year-ago if available.
Note holidays, fiscal calendars, and promo windows that explain spikes.

items: Separate one-off events from recurring seasonal lifts.

body.text: Staffing and inventory plans use seasonal baselines—not last week alone.
Refresh charts when fresh export lands; rules keep scope stable.
Datilio line charts on filtered weekly uploads reveal seasonality without a data science team.

meta_description: Seasonality hides in weekly CSV pulls until you chart enough history with consistent filters.
